suite.name: CN07-Cadastros

test.name: CT 07.13.09 - Validar botão "Fechar" no filtro buscar menu Cadastros > Cargos e Funções

kw.name: Dado que acesse a Isolar e logue no sistema
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Dado que clico no menu "Cadastros > Departamentos"
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element '//button[contains(@class,'inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 w-10')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element '//button[contains(@class,'inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 w-10')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então sistema verifica se filtro buscar fechou
Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Caso de teste valida se botão Fechar no filtro buscar menu Cadastros > Cargos e Funções está funcional

suite.doc: Modúlo que Gerencie informações cadastradas no sistema.
